title: salvia blancoana subsp. vellerea
intro: Salvia blancoana subsp. vellerea, also known as the Vellerea white sage, is a sub-species of the Salvia blancoana plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in its native regions, due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Salvia blancoana subsp. vellerea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
